questions.text: Has the Board approved a documented risk appetite statement that covers model risk?
Is there a documented model risk governance framework approved by the Board?
Does the organisation maintain a comprehensive inventory of all models in use?
Are models independently validated before deployment and at least annually thereafter?
Is there a documented data governance framework covering model inputs and outputs?
Are model documentation standards met including assumptions, limitations, and methodology?
Is there a documented process for escalating model-related issues to the Board?
Does the risk framework address concentration risk in model inputs and outputs?
